title: Air Place
description: A datapack that lets you place blocks in air.
body:
# Dependencies
- Commander Lib [https://modrinth.com/datapack/commander-lib](https://modrinth.com/datapack/commander-lib)

# Note
- Run the command "/reload" when first loading into your world with the datapack
- Currently air placing can only be done in creative mode the survival implementation is being worked on

# Uses
- Allows you to place blocks in the air when in creative mode without the need of adjacent blocks

# How To Use
When in creative mode you can do "/trigger Toggle_Air_Place" to toggle air placing, when toggled on you will get a indicator of where the block will be placed simply right click to place the block and left click to break it
